name: bootstrap-metadata
command: pwd; git branch --show-current; git rev-parse HEAD; date -u

name: anchor-before
command: python canonical URL count before update

name: anchor-after-first
command: python canonical URL count after first update

name: changelog-quality-check
command: python verify release section tags and role usage

name: anchor-after-second
command: python canonical URL count after second update

name: update-second-metadata-check
command: python validate second update metadata values

name: run-metadata
command: record worktree branch head base_ref timestamp
